subject: docs: sync CLAUDE.md with actual codebase, create docs/working
body:
CLAUDE.md had drifted from the actual file tree and contained
references to non-existent files. This commit brings documentation
back in line with reality.

Fixes:
- Replace ghost "Contact" component with actual component list
  (ActivityCharts, ActivityTimeline, InterestForm, DebugBanner,
  UpdatePrompt, InstallInstructionsModal)
- Add missing directories to Project Structure: src/constants/,
  src/utils/ (debugLog, pwa, validation)
- Add npm run lint to Commands section (was in package.json but
  undocumented)
- Fix "Interest notification form in Contact section" — there is
  no Contact section; InterestForm renders inline after Education
- Remove broken docs/EXTRACTION_PLAYBOOK.md reference from commit
  format; replace with inline tag guidance
- Add .env.example and vite.config.ts Workbox details to structure
- Add vitest.config.ts setupFiles detail
- Create docs/working/ directory with .gitkeep (was referenced in
  CLAUDE.md Paths and Workflow but did not exist)

Tags: docs, audit, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-audit
Semver: patch

title: sync CLAUDE.md with actual codebase, create docs/working
